title: Inversion count in an array
hints: Use merge sort approach to count inversions efficiently.
During the merge process, when an element from the right array is smaller than an element from the left array, all remaining elements in the left array form inversions with that right element.
Count inversions while merging: if B[l] > C[r], then all elements from l to n-1 in B form inversions with C[r].
Recursively count inversions in left half, right half, and during merge.
